name: physics-research-skills
description: Auto-activating skills for computational and theoretical physics research: a subject-agnostic research-process core (read / explore / production modes, rigorous derivation & verification, adversarial review) plus pluggable domain packs. First domain pack: topological insulators.

plugins.name: physics-research
plugins.description: Subject-agnostic physics research workflow: three research modes (literature-reading notes, cheap traceable exploration, trustworthy production pipeline) plus derivation, verification, figure, git, and review discipline. The domain-independent core.

plugins.name: topological-insulator
plugins.description: Domain pack for topological insulators: tight-binding H(k), symmetry / Altland-Zirnbauer class, Berry curvature & Chern number, Wilson loops / Wannier charge centers, Z2 invariants, edge states & bulk-boundary correspondence, k.p effective models, topological phase diagrams. Extends the physics-research core.
